instruction: Show me all men's large-size short-sleeve shirts with a discount of 50% or more.

evaluator.eval: check_direct_json_object(get_url_path_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'parse_keys': ['mens_clothing', 'shirts', 'Men_regular_size_t', 'Price_discount_range', 'short_sleeve']}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': {'mens_clothing': True, 'shirts': True, 'Men_regular_size_t': 'L', 'Price_discount_range': '50_PERCENT_ off & more', 'short_sleeve': True}}}))
